title: Crunchy Norwegian Lamb Stir-fry
description: This low-carb-friendly sour and crunchy dish is perfect for weeknight meals, featuring lime juice to add a zesty flavor.

ingredients.name: Lemon zest
ingredients.notes: For a slight citrus boost without extra acidity

ingredients.name: Garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: Mince finely for best flavor integration

ingredients.name: Salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: For seasoning, adjust according to preference

instructions: Season the lamb cutlets with salt and pepper, letting them marinate briefly to enhance flavors.
Heat a pressure cooker or skillet over medium-high heat. Add peanuts if using and cook until lightly golden, then remove from pan.
In the same pan, add enough oil for searing. Sear the seasoned lamb pieces until they turn golden brown on all sides.
Reduce heat to medium, add minced garlic and sauté briefly until fragrant but not burnt.
Pour in lime juice (including lemon zest if using) and simmer gently to allow flavors to meld together.
Gently stir in almonds into the sauce, ensuring they don't burn. Taste for seasoning adjustments as needed.
Cook for another 2-3 minutes until most of the liquid has been absorbed by the lamb. Remove from heat.
Serve hot with a side of steamed vegetables or over rice if preferred.
